title: Animated Explainer Video Creator
brief: We are looking for an experienced animated explainer video producer to create a 4–6 minute B2B explainer video for an automotive ecommerce platform. This project is focused on visual production only. We will provide: Final voiceover Final script Storyboard/scenes Branding assets Logos and color palette We need someone who can take the storyboard and script and turn it into a polished animated explainer video with clean motion graphics, strong pacing, and professional visual storytelling. Style We are primarily looking for: Simple flat 2D animation Motion graphics Clean transitions Modern B2B explainer style We are open to other visual approaches if you have a strong portfolio and can clearly explain your recommendation. Project Overview The video explains how automotive dealerships can sell aftermarket performance parts online and drive: Increased service revenue More upgrade/install business Additional wholesale opportunities Ecommerce growth without inventory burden The tone is operational, credible, and business-focused. This is NOT a flashy consumer ad. Deliverables One completed 16:9 explainer video Motion graphics + scene animation Visual assets/illustration as needed Final exported video Source files preferred (After Effects or equivalent) Timeline We are moving quickly. Target completion date: Friday, May 15 Please only apply if you can realistically meet this timeline. Budget Approximately $1,000 USD Open to discussion for the right fit. AI Usage AI-assisted workflow
